features.name: arrayed module instantiation with scalar ports receiving wide signals
features.description: Code should include an array of module instances where scalar ports receive connections from wide unpacked array signals
features.snippet:
module drv (input colSelA, input colSelB, output datao); assign datao = colSelB & colSelA; endmodule

module top; reg [31:0] a, b, res; drv t_drv [31:0] (.colSelA(a), .colSelB(b), .datao(res)); endmodule

features.name: replication operator for concatenation
features.description: Code should include replication operator used to create concatenations of repeated values
features.snippet: reg [31:0] a; reg [3:0] count; initial a = {8{4'b0000}}; always a = {8{count}};
